content.en:
The ghost fog is indeed terrifying, but if you sense it in advance and escape in time, you can avoid danger.

And the multi-dimensional beings that can survive in the depths of the Kunxu Land have the means to avoid the ghost fog, otherwise they would not dare to stay here.

this day.

Ye Tian found a golden substance in the depths of the Kunxu Land, and he swallowed a drop directly, but he could use this golden substance to greatly enhance the will of the soul and refine the body.

"It is worthy of the depths of the Kunxu Land, there are really many good things, no wonder those seventh-realm multi-dimensional beings and even the eighth-realm multi-dimensional lifeforms, at the risk of being swallowed by the ghost mist, also want to stay in the depths of this Kunxu land. "

Ye Tian took these golden substances away and continued to look for resources.

And he also encountered the ghost fog many times, and each time he ran away without touching the ghost fog.

Before you know it, hundreds of domain yuan years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian once again created a Seven Realms Supreme Absolute Sect - the Primal Law Phase, this Seven Realms Supreme Absolute Sect is to use the Primal Star plus the will and dimensional rules to form a Primal Star Law Phase.

The Primal Aspect can be used for defense, and it can also increase its own combat power, drawing wisps of power from the Primal Star to make up for its own energy consumption.

It can be said that this Seven Realms Supreme Absolute Sect is very powerful, and it has greatly improved Ye Tian's combat power.

Other than that.

He also created two thirteenth dimensional will masters, one for the primordial fluctuation and the other for the primordial star coat.

However, these two thirteenth dimensional will masteries have not improved his strength much, mainly because they have more means.

Another period of time has passed.

With the help of some resources in the depths of the Kunxu Land, Ye Tian finally raised his cultivation to the late realm of the seventh realm.

"It's almost time to meet the mysterious woman!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, this time, he did not use the current cultivation as the past, but copied a replica body from the past, and took the cultivation of the early stage of the seventh realm as the past, and the primordial domain body displayed was just an entry.

If it were to show the past of the primordial realm of the Great Adult level, the mysterious woman would feel unbelievable, maybe coveting his secret!

So, he's still low-key.

......

Spell Gold Vein.

Ye Tian came here and saw the mysterious woman.

At this time, the mysterious woman looked at Ye Tian and was immediately surprised.

"You've really cultivated into the Primordial Domain Body, so fast!"

The mysterious woman was shocked.

"It's just a fluke!"

Immediately, Ye Tian took out a part of the healing thing, about one-fifth of the weight, but even so, it still made the mysterious woman ecstatic.

"I didn't expect you to get so many healing things, it's great!"

The mysterious woman took these healing things, she was in a good mood, and immediately said: "Little guy, you are very good, there are a lot of healing things collected this time, enough for me to recover from my injuries, let's say, what chance do you want." "

"I want to raise the soul will to the fourteenth dimension!"

Ye Tian said.

His current soul will is the thirteenth dimension, but the limit of the seventh realm's soul will is the fourteenth dimension, and only a very small number of the seventh realm can be expected to raise the soul will to the fourteenth dimension.

"Is there a chance to raise the soul will to the fourteenth dimension?"

The mysterious woman thought for a while, and then spoke: "There is a special star in the sixteenth dimensional void - the fog star, the fog star is very mysterious, even the ninth realm does not dare to enter the fog star, otherwise the soul will will be obliterated, but the breath of the fog star can be used to refine the soul will, and it is also the best item I know to refine the soul will." Of course, you can't enter the sixteenth dimension now, but there is a special soul will secret technique, the Fog Soul Technique, which can absorb a wisp of the fog star to refine the soul will. However, the Fog Darkness Technique was not created by me, but was created by a Ninth Realm, and there are many Seventh Realms who practice the Fog Meditation Technique, but at least more than ninety of the hundred Seventh Realms have died, and the remaining few have survived after being severely injured, and only one has truly practiced the Fog Meditation Technique. "

"I just want the Mist Spell!"

Ye Tian asked.

The mysterious woman persuaded: "I don't want you to practice the Fog Meditation Technique, this secret art, even I don't dare to practice." This is just one of the methods, and you can continue to listen to my following methods. "

"There is also a Starlight Mist Valley in the thirteenth dimension, where there are also some resources that can temper the soul will, but there are many multi-dimensional beings in the eighth realm, and it is too dangerous for you to go now. "

Later, the mysterious woman said some methods, but none of them were very good.

After all, it is undoubtedly too difficult to quickly improve the will of the soul, those seventh realms are all based on countless years of time to improve little by little, where can it be so easy to break through!

In the end, Ye Tian still chose the Mist Meditation Technique!

Seeing that Ye Tian insisted on cultivating the Mist Soul Technique, the mysterious woman took out a gray stone: "'This is the Mist Soul Stone, you refine it, if you fail to cultivate the Mist Soul Technique, it can keep your soul will from shattering and dying.'" "

Ye Tian took the mist soul stone, and then retreated.

......

After coming back.

Ye Tian began to comprehend the Fog Soul Technique, as for the Fog Soul Stone, he didn't know how to use it, he didn't need the Fog Soul Stone.

After a while.

Ye Tian successfully comprehended the Fog Meditation Technique and prepared to cultivate for the first time.

However, comprehension is comprehension, and true cultivation is another matter.

It didn't take long.

Click!!!

Ye Tian failed to cultivate the Mist Meditation Technique, his soul will shattered, and this body instantly fell and dissipated.

"It's such a terrible fog and darkness, no wonder even that mysterious woman didn't dare to cultivate, and the ninth realm that created the fog and darkness technique is estimated to have only been created, but it has not been verified, it should be regarded as (Qian Haohao) is a mutilated and imperfect secret technique. "

Ye Tian muttered.

But once such a secret technique is successfully cultivated, the benefits are too great! Maybe there is no need to worry about the improvement of the soul's will in the future.

The value of such a secret technique is no less than that of the dimensional domain body, of course, this is for Ye Tian, for the other seventh realms and even the eighth realm, the value of this secret technique is not high.

Subsequently, another copy of his body continued to practice the Mist Meditation Technique.

This time, it was still a failure.

This was followed by the third failure, the fourth failure, and the fifth failure.

It wasn't until the eleventh time that Ye Tiancai finally got lucky enough to practice the Fog Meditation Technique.

Rumble!!!!

After the mist spell was cast, he immediately had a connection with the fog star in the sixteenth dimension, and immediately used the fog spell to absorb a wisp of fog star's breath across the dimensional void, descended on him, and merged into his soul will.
